hero.h1: EV Charging Prices 2026 - Up-to-date Price Comparison
hero.description: Türkiye's most comprehensive comparison platform for EV charging prices. Compare current AC and DC prices from ZES, Eşarj, Trugo, Beefull and 45+ charging networks. Track charging prices in real time, find the cheapest station and save.
hero.feature1Desc: Current AC and DC tariffs for 2026 with real-time price updates
hero.feature2Desc: Locations of 5000+ EV charging points across Türkiye
hero.feature3Desc: Charging prices from ZES, Eşarj, Trugo, Beefull and all other operators

mobileHero.title: EV Charging Prices
mobileHero.subtitle: Compare current AC and DC prices of 45+ charging networks and find the most affordable station.

priceTable.title: Charging Price Comparison
priceTable.subtitle: Compare current prices of EV charging operators in Türkiye in the table below.
priceTable.acTooltip: AC charging refers to 3.7-22kW slow charging stations.
priceTable.dcTooltip: DC charging refers to fast charging stations of 50kW+.
priceTable.infoWithDate: Prices were updated on {{date}} at {{time}}. For valid prices please visit the operator's official website. All prices are in TRY/kWh including VAT. We are not legally responsible for price differences.
priceTable.infoNoDate: For pricing information please visit the operator's official website. All prices are in TRY/kWh including VAT. We are not legally responsible for price differences.
priceTable.loadErrorDescription: Failed to load charging operator information. Please try again later.

footer.description: An independent platform that helps you compare prices of EV charging operators in Türkiye.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: ŞarjFiyat is an independent platform that lets EV drivers compare prices of charging station operators across Türkiye.
about.missionP1: Our mission is to provide EV users with transparent and up-to-date pricing information so they can find the most suitable charging solution. We aim to contribute to the growth of Türkiye's EV ecosystem and to help expand EV adoption.
about.missionP2: As an independent platform, we impartially compare current prices from all charging operators, helping users make informed choices.
about.contactIntro: For questions, suggestions, or partnership inquiries, you can reach us via:

survey.title: Charging Operator Satisfaction Survey
survey.subtitle: Share your EV charging experience and help other users. Rate each operator on a 5-star scale and add your comments.
survey.thankYou: Thank you! Your response has been saved.

campaigns.title: Campaigns

homeChargers.title: Home Chargers
homeChargers.subtitle: The best solutions to charge your EV at home
homeChargers.overview: Note for Türkiye customers: due to AliExpress platform restrictions, the shipping origin shown is Italy, but the actual shipping location is Istanbul and tax is already included. No additional fees are required.
specs: Certifications: CE, ROHS, FCC, CQC, TUV, UKCA, TSE, UL, RCM, etc.
homeChargers.compatibility: Our products are compatible with TOGG, Toyota, Tesla, MG, Renault, BYD, BMW, Nissan, Audi, Mercedes Benz, Kia, Volvo, Volkswagen and other vehicles. In fact, our product is compatible with all pure electric and hybrid vehicles.
homeChargers.usage: Plug into the outlet, set the required charging current via the device's "AMPS" button, press "TIME" to set the start time (adjustable 1-9 hours), then plug into the vehicle and start charging.
homeChargers.chooseText: When choosing the right home charger for your EV, consider your vehicle's charging capacity, your home's electrical infrastructure and your daily charging needs. Higher-power devices charge faster, but your home electrical system must support that power.
homeChargers.installText: Home chargers should generally be installed by a professional electrician. Some basic models work with standard outlets, while higher-power devices may require dedicated wiring and breakers. Verify the suitability of your electrical infrastructure before installation.

notFound.title: Sorry! Page not found
